value_chain_position: Aerospace components roll-up — acquires niche sole-source qualified parts manufacturers for defense and commercial aircraft; operates a portfolio of proprietary part numbers with aftermarket pricing power.
relative_comps: Loar is a small-cap TransDigm-model compounder: acquire sole-source aerospace parts businesses, raise aftermarket prices, harvest FCF. Revenue CAGR of 28% and FCF margin of 18% are high-quality metrics for the size. The main risk is that this model has become well-known and acquisition multiples for aerospace parts businesses are elevated. TransDigm (TDG) dominates the category at 10x the scale, making multiple-expansion harder for LOAR. Defense_tech fit is genuine but the value proposition is financial engineering + parts-pricing, not technology disruption per se.
